name: Order and Chaos
author: Stephen Sniderman (1981) / AGP
description: An asymmetric 6x6 tic-tac-toe variant. Each turn either player places an X or an O (both may use both symbols) on any empty cell. Order wins by forming a line of exactly five like symbols; Chaos wins by filling the board with no such line. A run of six does not count for Order. Order moves first.
